description_long: This object is a pair of eyeglasses with a classic, rectangular full-rim frame. The frame appears to be made of a dark, possibly tortoiseshell-patterned plastic or acetate, with thin, metallic temples that connect to the front via visible hinges. The lenses are clear and untinted, suggesting they are either prescription or non-prescription optical lenses. The bridge is gently curved, providing a comfortable fit across the nose, and the temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends for secure placement behind the ears. There are no visible embellishments or engravings on the temples, and the overall design is understated and functional. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: A pair of rectangular, full-rim eyeglasses with dark plastic frames and thin metallic temples, featuring clear lenses and a simple, classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular full-rim frame, clear lenses, and the gently curved bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin metallic temple and the hinge connecting it to the frame front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside of the frame and temples, with the curvature of the temple tips visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other metallic temple and hinge, mirroring the first side.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular full-rim frame with moderate thickness, straight top and bottom edges, and rounded corners. The temples are thin and straight, attached with standard hinges, and the overall style is classic and unembellished.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are completely clear and transparent, with no visible tint, gradient, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a simple, gently curved saddle style, integrated into the frame without separate nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and metallic with a slight curve at the ends. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
